title: astragalus sarae
intro: Astragalus sarae, also known as Sara's milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sarae include reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Astragalus sarae can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
